outlook_paragraph: CRGY shows elevated drilling activity with 9 active sites at decision date, 4.2 above recent norms, driven by 6 newly active pads—indicating renewed operational momentum heading into the final quarter. Despite only 20% exposure to the active segment, the combination of strong WTI prices near $85/boe and a healthy realized price differential supports a deterministic revenue forecast of $557M. Continuous activity on 3 pads suggests some sustained output, though reliance on new starts may imply shorter production duration.
